channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Josh Giddey, Matas Buzelis score 24 to lead the Bulls over the Heat 133-124
item.description: Rookie Matas Buzelis scored a career-best 24 points and Josh Giddey matched it to help the Chicago Bulls top the Miami Heat 133-124 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jayson Tatum scores 22, Celtics hold off Cavaliers 112-105 in matchup of Eastern Conference's best
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Jayson Tatum scored 22 points, Derrick White added 20 and the Boston Celtics showed their championship makeup down the stretch with a 112-105 win over the Cleveland Cavaliers on Tuesday night in a matchup of the Eastern Conference's top teams.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Joel Embiid has triple-double in 1st game in a month as Sixers slip past Mavs 118-116
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Joel Embiid had 29 points, 11 rebounds and 10 assists in his first action in a month to lead the Philadelphia 76ers to a 118-116 victory Tuesday night over the Dallas Mavericks, who fell to 0-2 since trading star Luka Doncic to the Los Angeles Lakers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Matt Nagy offers advice for Ben Johnson, prepares for 2nd matchup against Vic Fangio in the Big Game
item.description: Matt Nagy, Kansas City Chiefs offensive coordinator, shared advice for the next head coach of the Chicago Bears, emphasizing the importance of winning and beating the Packers.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Superstar rapper set to tip off NBA All-Star Weekend in San Francisco
item.description: Act quick to secure free tickets to see Chance the Rapper perform in concert at the NBA on TNT American Express Road Show during All-Star Weekend.
item.dc:creator: Jim Harrington, The Mercury News

item.title: Chiefs' Andy Reid admits feeling 'old' as Super Bowl matchup against son of former Eagles star looms
item.description: Andy Reid is familiar with coaching against his former team, the Philadelphia Eagles, but this Sunday's big game will present a unique matchup for the coach.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tiger Woods' mother, Kultida Woods, has died
item.description: Kultida Woods, the Thai-born mother of Tiger Woods, died Tuesday morning, a week after being seen attending his indoor TMRW Golf League in Florida.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON AP Golf Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lindsey Vonn's new titanium knee holds up fine in her 1st training run at the skiing worlds
item.description: SAALBACH-HINTERGLEMM, Austria (AP) — Big jumps. Lots of terrain. Steep pitches. The downhill course at the Alpine skiing world championships would have been a challenge for Lindsey Vonn’s aching legs before she retired in 2019.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Big 12 Conference unveils 2025 schedule, Utah and BYU to meet in October
item.description: It's a big day for college football fans as the Big 12 Conference released the full 2025 season schedule which includes the schedules for the Utah Utes and the BYU Cougars.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz lose heartbreaker to Indiana, 112-111
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz could not hold a 12-point lead in the final six minutes, and lose to the Indiana Pacers Monday night at the Delta Center, 112-111.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Rumors swirl about Warriors re-acquiring Kevin Durant amid chaotic NBA trade deadline
item.description: (KRON) -- The 2025 NBA trade deadline has provided even no shortage of excitement so far, and the Golden State Warriors could be the next team to get involved.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Caleb Williams voted GQ's most stylish football player
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Chicago Bears quarterback Caleb Williams has earned his first accolade since joining the NFL as the league's No. 1 overall pick last April. He took home GQ's fan vote for the Most Stylish Football Player Monday.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Doncic releases emotional farewell message to Dallas after trade sends him to Lakers
item.description: Luka Doncic released an emotional farewell to Dallas on Sunday, the same day a trade sending him from the Mavericks to the Los Angeles Lakers in a swap for fellow All-NBA player Anthony Davis was finalized.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Veteran invites Navy friends to run Carlsbad Marathon
item.description: When most old buddies reconnect they grab a bite to eat. Ryan Le and his friends, however, they go for a run.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Watch: Fans boo US national anthem at NHL game in Canada
item.description: The booing came shortly after Trump signed an order imposing stiff tariffs on imports from Canada, Mexico, and China.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, NewsNation

item.title: Canadian fans boo U.S. National Anthem at hockey game amid trade war
item.description: Canadians aren’t too happy with the tariffs being imposed on their country by U.S. President Donald Trump. Trump signed an order Saturday to impose stiff tariffs on imports from Canada as well as Mexico and China, which drew swift retaliation and sparked a trade war.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Luka Doncic to the Lakers, Anthony Davis to the Mavs in blockbuster trade, AP source says
item.description: Luka Doncic is being traded by the reigning Western Conference champion Dallas Mavericks to the Los Angeles Lakers for Anthony Davis, a person with knowledge of the agreement said early Sunday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: A 2,500th 3-pointer, a triple-double, Bronny's basket give LeBron James another memorable MSG game
item.description: A 2,500th 3-pointer for his career and his 10th triple-double this season. Not a bad 31st trip to Madison Square Garden for LeBron James. Pretty good first one for Bronny James, too.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Reinhart scores 30th, Maurice wins 900th as Panthers top Blackhawks after Slaggert's 7-second goal
item.description: Sam Reinhart got his 30th goal of the season and added two assists, Matthew Tkachuk scored for the third time in the last four games and the Florida Panthers beat the Chicago Blackhawks 5-1 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz end 8-game skid with 113-99 win over Magic
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - The losing streak is finally over. Collin Sexton scored 22 points and John Collins added 19 to help the Utah Jazz snap an eight-game losing streak with a 113-99 victory over the Orlando Magic on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Declan Doyle: The 28-year-old COO of Ben Johnson's offense
item.description: Declan Doyle, a 28-year-old Iowan, is the new offensive coordinator for the Chicago Bears, tasked with creating buy-in and being the COO of Ben Johnson's offense.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Dick Button, Olympic great and voice of skating, dies at 95
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Dick Button was more than the most accomplished men’s figure skater in history. He was one of his sport’s great innovators and promoters, the man responsible not only for inventing the flying camel spin but describing it to generations of fans.
item.dc:creator: BARRY WILNER and DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: NFL kicker Justin Tucker accused of sexual misconduct by 6 masseuses: report
item.description: Justin Tucker, kicker for the Baltimore Ravens, has been accused by six massage therapists at four separate businesses of sexually inappropriate behavior, the Baltimore Banner reported Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, KTLA 5

item.title: Dwyane Wade reveals cancer diagnosis, kidney surgery
item.description: The Chicago native shared the story of the "shocking" diagnosis and the emotional toll it took on him on the latest episode of his 'The Why' podcast.
item.dc:creator: BJ Lutz, WGN 9

item.title: Crosby's overtime goal beats Utah HC, 3-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Sidney Crosby scored with 1:06 left in overtime as the Pittsburgh Penguins beat the Utah Hockey Club 3-2 at Delta Center on Wednesday. It was Crosby's 95th career game-winning goal, moving him past Steve Yzerman for the 13th most in NHL history.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Scottie Scheffler details his hand injury from making ravioli and is ready to get back to golf
item.description: PEBBLE BEACH, Calif. (AP) — Scottie Scheffler felt frustrated sitting at home for two tournaments he normally plays while recovering from glass puncturing the palm of his right hand while making ravioli. A big part of him was thankful the injury wasn't worse.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5
